stemHtml: An aircraft accident takes place in the sea, in the territory of State A. The aircraft is registered in State B. The conduct of the investigation is the responsibility of (1) _____ and shall normally include, if possible, the determination of the causes and/or (2) _____.

options.a: (1) State A; (2) faults to apportion blame
options.d: (1) State B; (2) faults to apportion blame
